title: Ubiquiti UAP-XG Enterprise UniFi Access Point XG
description: UAP-XG is the ideal unit to cover a small area with large numbers of people - such as auditoriums, concert halls, etc. -. The total wireless modulation rate of 800 Mbps + 1733 Mbps will be converted into a cable thanks to a pair of Ethernet ports (1x 10/100 / 1000Mbps, 1x 1 / 10Gbps IMC) that both support input POEs according to the new 802.3bt standard . Power can also be supplied by the included passive POE adapter 50V / 1,2A UAP-XG offers up to 28 non-overlapping channels , 3 channels at 2.4GHz and 25 channels at 5GHz (including DFS channels). Thanks to 3 radio parts (1x 2.4GHz, 2x 5GHz) each unit can handle up to 1500 users, but the recommended number is half the theoretical maximum, ie 250 clients for each radio part Thanks to MU-MIMO (Multiple-User - Multiple-In - Multiple-Out) technology UAP AC-HD is able to communicate with several devices at the same time : 4 clients 1x1 2 clients 2x2 1 client 2x2 + 2 clients 1x1 1 client 3x3 + 1 client 1x1 UniFi APs doesn't have own web GUI and you manage them via UniFi Controller , which you can download on Ubiquiti websites here: http://www.ubnt.com . Or you can manage UAP devices using UniFi Cloud Key which has UniFi Controller preinstalled. Additional benefit is fact that UniFi Controller software is free of costs and includes advanced functions without limitations Zero Handoff Roaming -seamless roaming between UAP units Wireless uplink Up to 8 SSID Detailed statistisc of traffic Guest network Voucher system Load balance between units Speed limits for each SSID Device Holder Screws POE adapter AC power cord
